title: Decree No. 65 of 2020 Establishing the National Cyber Security Center
summary: Creates the institutional basis for national cybersecurity strategy, CNI protection, standards, guidelines, policies, risk assessment frameworks, audits, threat sharing, and national incident response coordination.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: Establishes Bahrain’s National Cyber Security Center.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Royal Order No. 17 of 2025 and Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028
